archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Enterprise Healthcare)

layout.spacing_system: Dense but highly structured. Use p-4 to p-6 inside widgets. Grid gaps should be gap-4 or gap-6.
layout.border_radius: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px). STRICTLY NO 32px radius (kill the bubble look).
layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. KPI cards span 3 cols, main data tables/charts span 9 or 12 cols.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders: Flat solid surfaces, 1px subtle borders (border-[#E2E8F0]), no muddy drop shadows. Use Neumorphism (clay & crisp) ONLY for small toggles.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A1628] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#1A2B44] hover:-translate-y-px transition-transform shadow-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A1628] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#F4F7FA] font-medium
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF5A5F] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-red-600 font-medium

components.cards: Cardless aesthetic or max 8px radius. 1px solid border. White background. No heavy drop shadows.
components.navigation: Dark Navy (#0A1628 to #1A2B44) header/sidebar. Active states use white/10 backgrounds or crisp white text. Inactive text is text-white/60.
components.tables: Dense rows. border-b on rows. Hover bg-[#F4F7FA]. Left aligned data, right aligned metrics/numbers. Table headers use the 'overline' typography rule.
components.calendar: Multi-view layout. Color-coded shift blocks: Teal (#14B8B6) for booked, Alert Orange/Red for vacant shifts. Drag-and-drop ready visual cues.
components.alerts: Vacant Shift alerts use #FF5A5F border-l-4 and subtle red background (#FFE4E6) for high visibility without blinding the user.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Duotone weight). Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react. Perfect for dense, technical healthcare dashboards.

motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on hover. Table rows subtly change background. Buttons translate-y-px.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Ditch the 32px ultra-rounded cards immediately. Use max 8px border-radius to establish an enterprise, authoritative feel.
2. Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout. Maximize horizontal space. Use strict optical alignment.
3. Use Dark Navy (#0A1628) for the main structural elements (Sidebar/Header) and Primary CTAs.
4. Use Teal (#14B8B6) and Lavender (#B794F4) STRICTLY as data-accents (e.g., chart lines, tags, calendar blocks, status indicators), NOT for large buttons or backgrounds.
5. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-carer-button').
6. Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for tables/body data to give it an enterprise yet human feel.
7. Forms must have clear label-input patterns with labels adopting the 'overline' text styling for crisp readability.
8. Implement a 'Grid Borders' approach for the main dashboard layout to expose the skeleton and look ultra-technical and organized.
